models.notes: Highly-capable multimodal model with the best combination of accuracy, speed, and cost for a wide range of tasks (prior-gen; Amazon Nova 2 is current).
Low-cost multimodal model that is lightning fast for processing images, video, documents, and text (prior-gen; distinct from nova-2-lite).
Text-only model that delivers the lowest-latency responses at very low cost (prior-gen; no Nova 2 Micro yet).
Multimodal model with text, audio, and vision capabilities API shutdown 2026-10-23; replaced by GPT-5.5.
Retired; replaced by GPT-5.5.
Shutdown 2026-12-11; replaced by GPT-5.5 Pro.
Reasoning model that excels at solving complex math, coding, and scientific challenges API shutdown 2026-12-11; replaced by GPT-5.5.
Shutdown 2026-12-11; replaced by GPT-5.4 mini.

Combines state-of-the-art reasoning with full tool capabilities, including web browsing and python analysis Shutdown; replaced by GPT-5.4 mini.
